pageDescription: Calculate mortgage payoff  with our free online calculator

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides mortgage payoff  estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual values may vary based on individual circumstances

importantNotesList: This is an estimate and should not replace professional advice
Results may vary based on individual factors
Use consistent units for accurate results

messages.enterInformation: Enter the required information to calculate mortgage payoff
messages.resultMessage: Your mortgage payoff  calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides mortgage payoff  estimates based on standard methods. Actual values may vary based on individual circumstances and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized advice and detailed information, consult with professionals who can provide guidance based on individual needs and circumstances.

errors.input1: Please enter a valid first value
errors.input2: Please enter a valid second value
errors.input3: Please enter a valid third value

i_know_the_unpaid_balance_and_monthly_pa: I know the unpaid balance and monthly payment
pay_half_your_monthly_payment_every_2_we: Pay half your monthly payment every 2 weeks (26 payments/year)
enter_mortgage_details_to_see_your_payof: Enter mortgage details to see your payoff analysis
total_interest_saved_with_extra_payments: Total interest saved with extra payments
extra_payments_reduce_your_loan_term_by_: • Extra payments reduce your loan term by
your_effective_interest_savings_rate_is_: • Your effective interest savings rate is
extra_payments_go_directly_to_principal_:
Extra payments go directly to principal, reducing total
                            interest paid
pay_off_your_mortgage_years_earlier_than: Pay off your mortgage years earlier than scheduled
build_home_equity_faster_with_accelerate:
Build home equity faster with accelerated principal
                            payments
add_a_fixed_amount_to_each_monthly_payme: Add a fixed amount to each monthly payment
use_tax_refunds_or_bonuses_for_extra_pay: Use tax refunds or bonuses for extra payments
pay_half_monthly_amount_every_2_weeks_26: Pay half monthly amount every 2 weeks (26 payments/year)
before_making_extra_mortgage_payments_en:
Before making extra mortgage payments, ensure you have an emergency
                      fund, are maximizing employer 401(k) matching, and have paid off higher-interest debt. Consider
                      your mortgage interest rate versus potential investment returns when deciding on extra payments.
